title: Responsive Design
content:
### Breakpoints System Tailwind provides five responsive breakpoints: | Prefix | Min Width | CSS | |--------|-----------|-----| | `sm:` | 640px | `@media (min-width: 640px)` | | `md:` | 768px | `@media (min-width: 768px)` | | `lg:` | 1024px | `@media (min-width: 1024px)` | | `xl:` | 1280px | `@media (min-width: 1280px)` | | `2xl:` | 1536px | `@media (min-width: 1536px)` | ### Mobile-First Approach Tailwind is mobile-first. Unprefixed classes apply to all screen sizes, and breakpoint prefixes apply at that size and above: ```html
``` ### Responsive Variants on Any Utility Almost every utility has responsive variants: ```html
``` ### Responsive Layout Patterns ```html
Sidebar
Content
Desktop sidebar
Mobile menu
``` ### Container with Max-Width The `.container` class changes its max-width at each breakpoint: ```html
``` ### Custom Breakpoints Add custom breakpoints in config: ```js module.exports = { theme: { extend: { screens: { 'xs': '475px', '3xl': '1600px', }, }, }, } ```
